title: Fix shell row icon+text alignment (space-between regression)
action: Fix a CSS alignment regression on shell rows. `.agent-card` (web/src/styles.css:454-468) is `display:flex; justify-content:space-between`, designed for its 2 in-flow children (`.agent-info` + `.status-badge`; `.agent-watermark` is `position:absolute` and out of flow) so info sits left and the status badge sits right. `.shell-row` (web/src/styles.css:519-521) inherits `.agent-card` but `renderShellRow` (web/src/views/switcher.ts:234-251) emits a different pair of in-flow children: `.shell-icon` + `.agent-info` (no status badge at all, by design per R13/D2 in docs/specs/switcher.md). With only those 2 items, `space-between` pushes `.shell-icon` to the far-left edge and `.agent-info` flush to the far-right edge, instead of the icon and text sitting together, left-aligned, separated by the existing `var(--space-3)` gap. Add `justify-content: flex-start;` to the existing `.shell-row` rule in web/src/styles.css so the icon and info block hug the left edge together. Do not touch the `.agent-card` rule (lines 454-468) — same non-interference pattern already documented in the comment above `.shell-row` (styles.css:516-518).

truths: The `.agent-card` rule block (lines ~454-468) is unchanged — still `justify-content: space-between`, still applies only to agent cards' own 2 in-flow children
key_links: renderShellRow's rendered markup (web/src/views/switcher.ts:239-249) has exactly 2 in-flow children: `.shell-icon` then `.agent-info`
prohibitions: No edits to web/src/views/switcher.ts or any test file

verify: grep -A3 '^\.shell-row {' web/src/styles.css | grep -q 'justify-content: flex-start' && grep -A15 '^\.agent-card {' web/src/styles.css | grep -q 'justify-content: space-between' && cd web && npm run typecheck && npm run test -- --run switcher.test.ts

trace.outcome: Added justify-content: flex-start to .shell-row to keep shell icon and agent-info left-aligned
